title: Stream name declarations fully centralized
evidence: All 24 stream names in RedisStreams constant. All production code uses RedisStreamsClient.STREAMS.*

title: Consumer group self-healing-manager not in expected canonical set
evidence: expert-self-healing-manager.ts:38 defines CONSUMER_GROUP_NAME = self-healing-manager
actual: Additional group exists - legitimate but undocumented
recommendation: Add to canonical consumer group registry

title: Mempool config uses || instead of ?? for consumer group default
evidence: shared/config/src/mempool-config.ts:77
actual: Uses || which treats empty string as falsy

title: All 24 streams have MAXLEN in STREAM_MAX_LENGTHS registry
evidence: streams.ts:404-432. Unknown streams get default 5000 with warning

title: No raw xadd bypasses in production code
evidence: All production xadd calls route through xaddWithLimit

title: All xreadgroup consumers have matching xack
evidence: 7 consumer files, all have xack via direct calls or StreamConsumer autoAck:true

title: 204 undocumented env vars (21 critical, 43 high, 140 medium), 30 orphaned
evidence: 303 env vars in code, 121 in .env.example. Security-sensitive: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY, JWT_SECRET, TENDERLY_API_KEY. Behavior-controlling: MAX_CONCURRENT_EXECUTIONS, SHUTDOWN_DRAIN_TIMEOUT_MS.
recommendation: Prioritize documenting 21 security-sensitive and 43 behavior-controlling vars

title: 10 FLASH_LOAN_CONTRACT_* per-chain env vars undocumented
evidence: feature-flags.ts:622-623 dynamically reads process.env[FLASH_LOAN_CONTRACT_${chain}] for 10 chains (ethereum, arbitrum, base, polygon, optimism, avalanche, bsc, fantom, zksync, linea). None appear in .env.example.

title: 9 orphaned env vars in .env.example never referenced in code
evidence: CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD, COMMIT_REVEAL_VALIDATE_PROFIT, COW_BACKRUN_ETH_PRICE_USD, MIN_PROFIT_PERCENTAGE, UNIFIED_DETECTOR_PORT, P1_ASIA_FAST_PORT, P2_L2_TURBO_PORT, P3_HIGH_VALUE_PORT, P4_SOLANA_PORT
expected: All documented vars referenced in code
recommendation: Remove or implement. MIN_PROFIT_PERCENTAGE may be typo for COORDINATOR_MIN_PROFIT_PERCENTAGE.

title: No || 0 anti-pattern in production code
evidence: 9 occurrences found only in test files (6 files). Zero in production

title: HMAC signing fully configured with rotation support and fail-closed enforcement
evidence: STREAM_SIGNING_KEY at .env.example:616, STREAM_SIGNING_KEY_PREVIOUS at :620. streams.ts:459-464 throws in production without key. streams.ts:1608-1618 guards empty/whitespace.

title: Feature flags defined and documented
evidence: 23 FEATURE_* flags matching expected set with cross-dependencies

title: Risk configuration params documented in .env.example
evidence: RISK_TOTAL_CAPITAL and associated risk params present

title: All parseInt/parseFloat of env vars have NaN protection
evidence: Migration completed in commit 7265a96a. All use Number.isNaN guards, parseEnvIntSafe, or parseEnvFloatSafe

title: test-utils cache-test.harness.ts parseInt missing radix
evidence: cache-test.harness.ts:42 parseInt without radix 10

title: enableReadyCheck misaligned between Redis clients
evidence: client.ts:217 enableReadyCheck:false; streams.ts omits (defaults true)
actual: RedisClient skips, RedisStreamsClient performs ready check

title: retryDelayOnFailover misaligned (100ms vs 200ms default)
evidence: client.ts:216 retryDelayOnFailover:100; streams.ts omits (default 200)

title: Core Redis settings aligned: retryStrategy, connectTimeout(3000), maxRetriesPerRequest(3), lazyConnect(true)
evidence: Both use identical retry formula, timeouts, and connection behavior

title: All service ports unique and match service-ports.json
evidence: 11 service ports, all unique, matching canonical registry

title: fire-and-forget .catch on HTTP/2 pool close
evidence: provider.service.ts:815

title: fire-and-forget .catch on monolith shutdown
evidence: worker-manager.ts:357, index.ts:357

title: 97 bare catch blocks all have appropriate handling
evidence: Sampled 25+ blocks - all contain logging, return fallbacks, or comments

title: getOptionalNumber drops string-encoded numerics from stream-serialized opportunities
evidence: type-guards.ts:60 checks typeof value === number but stream-serialization converts to strings

title: parseStreamResult relies on JSON.parse with no schema validation
evidence: streams.ts:1442-1446 implicit type restoration
recommendation: Document that consumers handle type safety

title: metrics:recent global key naming inconsistent
evidence: enhanced-health-monitor.ts writes metrics:recent (global), client.ts writes metrics:${serviceName}:recent
actual: Global at same level as per-service

title: ADR-033 stale price threshold confirmed at 30000ms
evidence: detector.ts:1486 maxPriceAgeMs ?? 30000

title: ADR-005 SharedArrayBuffer confirmed for L1 cache
evidence: price-matrix.ts:224 SharedArrayBuffer with fallback to ArrayBuffer

title: ADR-018 circuit breaker failureThreshold default is 5
evidence: types.ts:681, circuit-breaker.ts:408, self-healing-manager.ts:36

title: ADR-002 no direct inter-service HTTP calls
evidence: Only CORS config and test files reference localhost ports

title: ADR-022 no spread operators in hot-path loops
evidence: Spread only in getter methods, not loops

title: Execution engine Fly.io port 8080 diverges from service-ports.json 3005
evidence: execution-engine.toml: 8080. service-ports.json: 3005. Docker: 3005.

title: All Dockerfiles use node:22-alpine
evidence: All 10+ Dockerfiles confirmed

title: Health check paths consistent across deployment contexts
evidence: Coordinator /api/health, others /health - consistent across Fly.io, Docker, code

title: Execution engine SHUTDOWN_TIMEOUT_MS 5s is tight for Redis disconnect
evidence: 5000ms > 3000ms valid but tight for 3 sequential disconnects

title: Coordinator timeout hierarchy valid: shutdown(15s) > Redis(3s)
evidence: shutdownTimeoutMs=15000 > connectTimeout=3000

title: Partition service timeout hierarchy valid: shutdown(8s) > Redis(3s)
evidence: SHUTDOWN_TIMEOUT_MS=8000 > connectTimeout=3000

title: Cross-chain detector per-disconnect timeout valid: 4s > Redis 3s
evidence: 4000ms per disconnect, 2x4s=8s < force-exit

title: Execution engine bootstrap shutdown not validated at startup
evidence: drainTimeoutMs + 15000 computed dynamically with no assertion
